global_summary: Company is behind pace by 16 points, with just 22 of 151 tasks done. Cashflow delays are stalling brick and material buys across several sites. Only Katie Holmes is on pace; push framing and trim tasks before Sunday.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Only 1 of 12 tasks done with the week nearly over. Finish painting and the final building inspection today, July 10, to save the week.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Badly behind — brick buy stalled by cashflow, mason now working Saturday. Complete brick installation and trash haul by July 11.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Behind plan, 2 of 26 done, and tile install slipped a week. Buy interior doors today and install kitchen electrical trim by July 12.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Slightly behind — foundation form board waiting on Efrain, who returns Sunday. Place the form board Tuesday to keep foundation on schedule.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: Behind plan, 3 of 9 weekly tasks done, with carpet and backsplash pushed a week on late materials. Install window shutters by July 17.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Behind plan with framing lagging — sheathing and roof decking slipped several days. Complete roof decking and install doors and windows by July 13.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Behind plan, 4 of 11 weekly tasks done, awaiting plumbing fixtures. Install mechanical and electrical trim by July 13 to recover.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: Behind but progressing — MEP rough-ins done, awaiting inspection before drywall. Schedule the electrical rough-in inspection and execute mechanical rough-in this week.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: On pace with the drywall sub starting Saturday. Hang sheetrock and keep the painting work order moving.
